title: Jinyi Shen Jiang
synopsis:
In the first year of the Tianqi reign, government agencies flourished, and new and old factions vied for power and engaged in scheming and chaos. Shen Wen, a scholar from Qinan Prefecture, skilled in carpentry, was unwittingly drawn into the theft of a royal treasure one day, thus meeting Mu Siqing, a commander of the Embroidered Uniform Guard. Shen Wen discovered that the treasure the Embroidered Uniform Guard was searching for was actually the Six Harmonies Beast Diagram, the very diagram that had led to the massacre of his entire family. The Six Harmonies Beast Diagram contained secrets of the imperial court. In order to find his family's killer and unravel the secrets of the Six Harmonies Beast Diagram, Shen Wen decided to secretly infiltrate the Northern Garrison to uncover the truth of what happened back then.

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
